name: Keras Resources Plc
summary: Keras Resources Plc, a mineral resource company, engages in the exploration, evaluation, and development of mineral properties in West Africa. It holds 51% interests in the Diamond Creek phosphate project located in Salt Lake City, Utah; and 85% interests in the Nayega manganese project, which covers an area of 92,390 hectares in northern Togo. The company was formerly known as Ferrex PLC and changed its name to Keras Resources Plc in December 2015. Keras Resources Plc was incorporated in 2010 and is based in London, the United Kingdom.
